title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: SolarEdge Technologies Q2 2023 Earnings Highlights. Financial Performance: SolarEdge achieved record Q2 revenues of 991.3 million, representing 5% quarter-over-quarter and 36% year-over-year growth. Solar segment revenues hit 947.4 million, driven primarily by exceptional European performance. Regional Performance: Europe: Record 688.5 million in revenues (73% of total), up 19% quarter-over-quarter and 112% year-over-year. United States: 195.6 million, down 23% quarter-over-quarter due to higher interest rates and NEM 3.0 impacts. Rest of World: 63.3 million, with strong growth in South Africa and Thailand. Key Operational Metrics: The company shipped 5.5 million power optimizers, 335,000 inverters, and 269 megawatt-hours of residential batteries (22% increase from Q1). Commercial segment shipments grew substantially to 2.6 gigawatts from 1.5 gigawatts in Q4 2022. Margin Performance: Non-GAAP gross margin reached 32.7%, with solar segment margins at 34.7%. Management noted that commercial inverters typically carry 500-700 basis points lower margins than residential. Forward Guidance: Q3 2023 revenue guidance: 880-920 million. Expected non-GAAP gross margin: 28-31%. Strategic Initiatives: Management highlighted investments in SolarEdge One digital platform, grid services expansion (70% enrollment growth), and U.S. manufacturing ramp-up through contract partners.
